It builds Markdown content into a static site and outputs to a configurable directory (default ",["$","$L3",null,{"children":"docs/dist"}],")—perfect for GitHub Pages, GitLab Pages, or any static hosting."]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"level":2,"id":"features","children":"Features"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Markdown-first"}]," – Write docs in plain Markdown, no Blade required"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"HydePHP-powered"}]," – Full Hyde feature set: search, dark mode, sitemaps, RSS"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"GitHub Actions ready"}]," – Reusable workflow for build-and-deploy"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"language":"txt","children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Monorepo friendly"}]," – Works as a package at ",["$","$L3",null,{"children":"packages/laravel-docit"}]," or via Composer"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"level":2,"id":"requirements","children":"Requirements"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"PHP 8.2+"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Node.js (for Tailwind asset compilation)"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"level":2,"id":"quick-start","children":"Quick Start"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"language":"txt","children":["Add a ",["$","$L3",null,{"children":"docit"}]," script to your ",["$","$L3",null,{"children":"composer.json"}]," and run ",["$","$L3",null,{"children":"composer docit"}],".
